name: DeepSeek-V2
tagline: First DeepSeek MoE flagship (236B total / 21B active) introducing Multi-head Latent Attention; open weights.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-V2 (DeepSeek), released 2024-05 — part of the DeepSeek V3 line. First DeepSeek MoE flagship (236B total / 21B active) introducing Multi-head Latent At…
overview: DeepSeek-V2 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek V3 line. Released 2024-05. General-purpose open-weight MoE line (671B/685B total, ~37B active) that introduced sparse-attention efficiency and hybrid thinking/non-thinking modes; predecessor to V4.
What's notable in this version: First DeepSeek MoE flagship (236B total / 21B active) introducing Multi-head Latent Attention; open weights.
